violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC placed utensils in mini warmer to be kept at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or higher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans covers in walk-in have an accumulation of dust, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

Employees jackets were observed hanging on food rack. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of EMPLOYEE clothing and other possessions. PIC relocated jackets to designated area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
The menu posted for consumers in the establishment does not have an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2023
